name: Jamie Raskin
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,238,058 for Jamie Raskin in U.S. House, MD-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
